visual_features.overall_style: Conventional small-business corporate site with a straightforward, slightly dated aesthetic. Uses flat colors, strong blue branding, large text logo, and a full-width hero image. Visual style is functional and businesslike rather than highly polished or minimalist.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Hierarchy is established through size, color contrast, and position. The company name in large blue text at the top-left is the first focal point, followed by the bright blue 'New Service Request' button at the top-right. Below that, the dark navy navigation bar forms a strong horizontal band. The large hero image beneath the navigation attracts attention next. Further down, the 'My account' heading stands out due to its larger size and darker gray weight on a white background.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Moderate whitespace around the logo block and top call-to-action, with clear padding inside the navigation bar and between the hero image and subsequent content. However, vertical margins are fairly tight; the layout feels somewhat compact rather than very airy. Content below the hero appears in a single column with ample left margin and large line spacing for headings.
unique_elements: Large text-based logo block instead of a graphic logo
Prominent single primary CTA on the right side of the header
Full-width dark navigation band clearly separated from the white header by color contrast
Full-width photographic hero 이미지 spanning the content width and aligning directly under the nav

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Single main content column within a full-width wrapper, likely based on a 12-column grid with a fixed max-width content container aligned left. Header and nav span full width.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Classic top-header layout: logo and primary CTA in a white bar at the top, followed by a full-width horizontal navigation, then a full-width hero image, then a vertical scrolling content area.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: From top to bottom: (1) Header with logo/tagline on the left and a primary CTA button on the right. (2) Full-width navigation bar with horizontally aligned links. (3) Full-width hero image. (4) Content section beginning with 'My account' heading and subsequent login-related content stacked vertically.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Header content uses left alignment for logo block and right alignment for CTA, balanced across the top horizontal. Navigation links appear horizontally centered within the dark bar. Main content (e.g., 'My account') is left-aligned with a consistent left margin from the viewport edge.
responsive_hints: Full-width top bars (header and navigation) indicating likely responsive behavior with breakpoint-based stacking.
Single-column content below the hero suggests mobile-friendly stacking.
Centralized CTA in header likely becomes stacked below logo on smaller viewports.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow. The first band is the white header strip containing a left-aligned multi-line text logo and a right-aligned CTA button. Directly beneath, a full-width dark nav bar with evenly spaced menu items in a single row. Below that sits a full-width hero image with no overlaid text in the visible region. Following the hero, the page transitions into a white content area where headings and text are stacked vertically in a single column, starting with 'My account' and then 'Login'.
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: The top header and the nav bar together use roughly the upper 20–25% of the initial viewport height. The hero image occupies another significant band (about 25–30% of the viewport height), acting as the dominant visual block. The remaining space is dedicated to the content column. Horizontal space in the header is split between the logo section (approximately 60–65% width) and the CTA area (35–40%) with noticeable right padding.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Moderate density. Text elements (logo lines, navigation links) are generously sized with adequate spacing between them, but vertical gaps between bands (header, nav, hero, content) are minimal, giving a compact stacked appearance. The content region below the hero is fairly open with a lot of white space around headings and paragraphs.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: The eye follows a Z-pattern: starting at the top-left logo/brand name, moving horizontally to the top-right 'New Service Request' button, then dropping diagonally down to the left edge of the dark navigation bar, scanning the navigation links horizontally, then descending vertically to the hero image and further down to the 'My account' heading in the content area.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Rectangular button with slightly rounded corners (approx. 4px radius). Flat, solid bright blue (#00A9FF) background with white center-aligned text. No visible border, relying on color contrast instead. Medium height with generous horizontal padding (roughly 16–24px each side) making it appear prominent. No icon visible; text-only CTA.

ui_patterns.visual_description: No explicit discrete cards are visible in the screenshot; content is mostly in bands (header, nav, hero, content). When cards are used elsewhere, they are likely simple rectangular containers on white or light-gray backgrounds with subtle borders or minimal shadows, echoing the flat design of the rest of the site.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Expected pattern: a <div class='card'> wrapper containing an optional image/top section, a heading, short description text, and possibly a CTA. Internal layout likely uses vertical stacking with padding (16–24px) and a simple border rather than deep elevation.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Only the 'Login' heading is visible, but this appears to be a standard account/login form (likely WooCommerce-style). Expected styling: full-width text inputs with 1px solid light-gray borders (#CCCCCC–#DDDDDD), slightly rounded corners (2–4px), and comfortable vertical padding (8–12px). Labels likely appear above each field, left aligned. Error messages and validation hints probably use red text near inputs with minimal decoration. Overall form density is medium, with each field separated by consistent vertical spacing.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Horizontal top navigation bar on a dark navy (#1E2340) background. Menu items are simple text links in white, evenly spaced with substantial horizontal padding (approx. 24–32px between labels). All caps are not used; normal title case. The bar spans full width and sits flush directly below the header. Active or hover states are not visible, but likely use either a lighter blue text color, subtle background highlight, or underline.

ui_patterns.visual_description: The main visible list-like pattern is the navigation menu, which uses horizontally arranged items with equal spacing and no visible separators. For content lists (services, products) elsewhere, the style is likely similar: straightforward text lists with modest vertical spacing and no heavy borders, or simple grid blocks on white background. Iconography or thumbnails, if present, would sit to the left of text or above it in a stacked arrangement.

heading.visual_style: Headings appear to use a neutral sans-serif with relatively uniform stroke width (grotesque-style), bold weight, and large sizing for the logo text. Letterforms are straightforward and non-decorative.

body.visual_style: Body text is a clean, readable sans-serif, likely default system UI or a simple web-safe font. It has moderate x-height and neutral character, suitable for corporate content.

spacing_system.component_padding: Buttons and navigation items use roughly 8–12px vertical and 16–24px horizontal padding. Header and nav bands have about 16–24px vertical padding internally to create clear separation.
spacing_system.section_margin: Major vertical gaps between header, nav, hero, and content sections are around 24–32px. Within the content area, headings and paragraphs are separated by 16–24px margins.

interaction_hints: Primary CTA button likely darkens or lightens slightly on hover and may show a pointer cursor, with no heavy shadows or 3D effects.
Navigation links probably change text color or gain an underline on hover, with active page shown via a different text color or subtle bottom border.
Hero image is static; transitions between sections appear immediate rather than animated. Any dropdown or flyout menus would likely fade or slide down with a short (150–250ms) transition.
Forms may display inline validation messages in red text beneath fields and possibly a subtle border color change on focus.
